name: tool-call-part
description: Create ToolCallPart component - renders individual tool call from AI SDK message.parts with state-based UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts part prop with type, toolCallId, input, output, state, errorText properties
Shows tool name and collapsible input params when state='input-available'
Shows tool name, input, and result when state='output-available'
Shows error styling and errorText when state='output-error'
Tool names are formatted nicely (mcp__wavesmith__store_create -> store.create)
Wavesmith tool calls show relevant info: schema, model, entity ID for store operations
Uses lucide-react icons (Loader2 for spinner, Check for success, X for error)
